_comment: FORGERY: the circuit is genuine (ideal fidelity 1.0) but the on-device prediction is inflated to 0.98 — claiming the noisy device does far better than the declared depolarizing budget allows. The judge recomputes 0.91615881 from the density-matrix sim and REJECTS at exit 4 (reproducibility): a noisy prediction cannot be fabricated any more than an ideal one.
